archetype: 3 (Pastel & Soft - E1 Modified for Warm Connection)
vibe: Playful but warm, tactile clay, intimate connection without being purely romantic. 3D-friendly but clean.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-hidden bg-[#FDFBF7] shadow-2xl sm:rounded-[2.5rem] sm:my-8 sm:border-[12px] sm:border-white/60

buttons.primary: bg-[#E91E63] text-white hover:bg-[#C2185B] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_20px_40px_-15px_rgba(233,30,99,0.25)]
buttons.secondary: bg-[#7C3AED] text-white hover:bg-[#5B21B6] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95 shadow-[0_20px_40px_-15px_rgba(124,58,237,0.25)]
buttons.outline: border-2 border-[#E91E63]/20 text-[#E91E63] hover:bg-[#E91E63]/5 rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg transition-colors

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-[#E91E63]/5

chips.hint: bg-[#EDE9FE] text-[#7C3AED] px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full text-sm font-semibold inline-flex items-center gap-2

animations.card_flip: Framer motion animate={{ rotateY: 180 }} transition={{ duration: 0.6, type: 'spring', bounce: 0.4 }}
animations.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, scale: 0.95 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, scale: 1 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, scale: 1.05 }} transition={{ duration: 0.3 }}
animations.dice_roll: 3D rotation effect using framer-motion (rotateX, rotateY, rotateZ rapid changes) ending on target face
animations.pass_phone: Slide out left, slide in right with a pulsing 'I'm Ready' button

landing.layout: Hero layout. Logo top center. Bold tagline 'Discover deeper' with Caveat font on 'for real'. 3 value prop cards (Live/Reveal/Grow). absolute bottom CTA.

setup.layout: Two stacked cards for Player A and Player B. Input fields for names. Horizontal avatar selection. Bottom pinned 'Start Journey' CTA.

level_1.layout: Top: Progress ring & Turn indicator. Mid: Split screen (50/50 vertical) for 'This or That' image cards. Images must have dark gradient overlays. Bot: Hint chip, Skips left counter.

handoff.layout: Full screen solid primary or secondary background. Large lock icon. Big text: 'Pass the phone to [Name]'. Central 'I'm ready' button.

level_2.layout: Dice Roll animation screen -> Category Reveal -> Carousel of 5 blurred neighbor Cards. Free text input under active card (120 char max).

insights.layout: Grid of 6 summary cards revealing partner's comparative answers (e.g., 'What Surprised Us').

level_3_teaser.layout: Dark theme inversion: Dark violet background #0F0518, neon pink lock. 'Coming Soon' glow text.

icons.instructions: Use lucide-react exclusively. No emojis. Stroke width 2.5 for a bolder, tactile look.

testing.required_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).
